subcodes.first_line: O Leaf of My Lote-Tree, thou that circlest round about Me, that soarest in the atmosphere of My mercy, and that drinkest of the chalice of My bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقه سدرتی و الطائفه حولی و الطائره فی هوآء رحمتی و الشاربه کاس عطائی و
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @theodicy; the mystery of evil; of suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort
